title: URouter_Machine
text: URouter_Machine Specifies the host identifier of the machine where the Uniface Router is located. URouter_Machine = localhost | HostID For example: urouter_machine=localhost or urouter_machine=127.0.0.1 Default value: localhost File section: [install] Arguments HostID is the network node name for the machine, for example AMS093606.uniface.emea or 127.0.0.1 . Description This setting is used in configuring the local Uniface test environment. In some cases, for example, when you want to use the QR code generation feature, it is better to replace localhost with the actual machine name or DNS number. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
